title: Create: Fixed Redstone Links
description: Small tweak to the redstone link models to make it easier to see which mode they are in.
body:
| **Should work on any version of create.** |
| --- |

---
This is a super small resource pack that has a big impact when making compact create contraptions.

### Before:
![Default Create Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfc989fac7cf894ec5140b0d448624b8ab3c91a7.png)
(Impossible to tell if in receive or transmit mode when a block is placed above.)
### After:
![Texture Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bcb00925c2f279e14b91c48192bf779d5844454.png)
(Easy to tell mode reguardless of where its placed.)

---
| Please message `CharmDragon` through discord for any suggestions or concerns. |
| ---- |
